headerDisplay: Surfaces Pikud HaOref real-time alerts as HomeKit Motion Sensors. Each monitored area gets **one sensor** that triggers on any alert — or one sensor per alert type if you configure specific categories.

areas.title: Monitored Areas
areas.description: Hebrew city/area names to monitor (e.g. תל אביב). Each area gets one Motion Sensor in HomeKit.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to check for active alerts. Minimum 2 seconds.

resetDelay.title: Reset Delay (seconds)
resetDelay.description: How long to keep the motion sensor triggered after an alert clears.

categories.title: Alert Categories
categories.description: Optional — leave empty for one combined sensor per area (recommended). Configure specific IDs to get separate sensors per alert type: 1=Rockets, 2=UAV, 3=Earthquake, 4=CBRN, 5=Tsunami, 6=Infiltration, 7=Unconventional Missile, 10=Incoming Expected, 13=Event Ended.

items.title: Alert Categories (leave empty for combined sensor)
